name: PT Maming Enam Sembilan Mineral Tbk
summary: PT Maming Enam Sembilan Mineral Tbk, through its subsidiary, PT Rezki Batulicin Transport, engages in the field of land transportation in Indonesia. The company's activities include goods and passengers transportation; warehousing; and freight transportation, which includes transportation for goods, containers, and tracking trailers; and mining and petroleum transportation, and transportation for plantation products. It has 6 scania units, 59 dump truck units, 2 water tank units, and 20 units of Volvo double trailers. The company was formerly known as PT Majapahit Inti Corpora Tbk and changed its name to PT Maming Enam Sembilan Mineral Tbk in January 2020. PT Maming Enam Sembilan Mineral Tbk was founded in 1990 and is based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Maming Enam Sembilan Mineral Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Batulicin Enam Sembilan Transportasi.
